name: Mike Mikus
subject: Team Blue PA
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3144976964838752256/5840348481025212416?refcode=e20160620&refcode2=e20160620ndb&amount=25)
---
Friends, I wanted you to be the first to know. Here at McGinty HQ, we're launching a brand new grassroots effort: **Team Blue PA** -- a group of dedicated people who proudly believe in progress, fairness, and real opportunity for all Americans, and aren't afraid to show it. [**And I need you to be a part of it.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3144976964838752256/5840348481025212416?refcode=e20160620&refcode2=e20160620ndb&amount=25)

We have a real opportunity to win this race, kick Toomey out of office, and take back the Senate. Will you help us turn Pennsylvania blue?

[**Chip in $5 or more before tomorrow to become one of the founders of this movement. Every dollar will help send Katie McGinty to Washington to fight for hardworking Pennsylvanians.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3144976964838752256/5840348481025212416?refcode=e20160620&refcode2=e20160620ndb&amount=25)

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3144976964838752256/5840348481025212416?refcode=e20160620&refcode2=e20160620ndb&amount=25)
---

Pat Toomey has picked his side. He's worked long and hard to keep special interests in power, and now he's got their backing -- and their money. But we don't have to let the few ruin it for the many.

Join Team Blue PA today, and stand strong against Toomey and his allies. It's a team we know we can count on to do their part to turn this state blue.

**We 're wrapping up our team roster tomorrow night, friend, so don't wait. Join the team:**

[**www.katiemcginty.com/TeamBluePA**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3144976964838752256/5840348481025212416?refcode=e20160620&refcode2=e20160620ndb&amount=25)

True blue,

Mike Mikus
Chief Strategist

*** A note on donations ***

Katie McGinty is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. If we're going to win this race, take back the Senate, and turn PA blue, then we need to stand together.

**[Join Team Blue PA today](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3144976964838752256/5840348481025212416?refcode=e20160620&refcode2=e20160620ndb&amount=25 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20160612&refcode2=e20160612nd&amount=25")**
---
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3144976964838752256/5768290886987284480).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Team Portman
subject: Peter's online donation
body:
| Peter --

We noticed that you have not donated online to the campaign yet. As you know, Rob Portman is running in a swing state as the National Democrats’ #1 target. They are committed to spending more money against Rob than any other candidate in the country. Voters have a choice between Rob’s pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs... ...or Hillary Clinton’s hand-picked candidate, Ted Strickland, who oversaw the loss of more than 350,000 jobs when Ohio ranked 48th in job creation during his single failed term as governor.
Will you join Rob’s campaign by donating just $5 or more today? We are counting on supporters like you to win this election. Please let us know if you can donate to the campaign!

[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcontribute.robportman.com%2Fcontribute_first%3Fcampaign_id%3D9acbd08b836a02796735f22285d320c2%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26utm_campaign%3Deoq_nondonor_01&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoq_nondonor_01&n=1 "Donate Here!")

name: Bill Cole
subject: Happy Birthday West Virginia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend --
West Virginians have much to be proud of in our state. We played a key role in winning the Civil War that preserved our union and ended slavery when President Abraham Lincoln by proclamation granted us statehood. We are proud of our state – its beauty, its history, and its people. We have used the abundant natural resources God has given us and turned them into energy that has literally powered our nation, which has in turn strengthened our union. Our heritage is rich with coal. Coal has, for generations, provided a cheap and reliable energy source for our country. But, Washington politicians like President Obama and Hillary Clinton have declared war on not just coal but on all fossil fuels. Their efforts have denied us the economic freedoms that we for generations have enjoyed. Their war has been devastating to our state budget, our economy and our communities. Sadly, it has also tarnished the pride of our people. The pride of our state and strength of our people has always been rooted in our state motto – _Montani Semper Liberi_ – Mountaineers are always free. Today, liberal politicians in Washington threaten our constitutional freedoms by trying to chip away at our Second Amendment rights. We must stand strong to protect our freedoms. These attacks on our freedoms and on our way of life have challenged us, but we have proven throughout our 153 years of statehood that we have the pride in our culture and strength of our people to overcome these challenges and preserve our freedoms. There is nothing wrong with West Virginia that the strength of our work ethic and pride of our people can’t fix. United, we can once again become West Virginia Proud and West Virginia Strong.

Happy Birthday West Virginia.
[http://www.billcolewv.com/](http://www.billcolewv.com/?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wv_day&n=1)

name: Austin Chambers
subject: did you hear?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
Did you hear the major announcement on Friday?

Navy SEAL Team Six Operator, and one of our nation's most decorated veterans, Robert O'Neill will be coming to Missouri on June 28th to campaign with Eric! Among the events, will be [a 5pm rally in St. Louis!](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabakVDzy2nY5C2rNUqMCS8al-2BGcvd7iq-2Fx9Zq7DQWFu87wPzHiG7wTB9ewkguA3-2BnQ1Gj29d0I2mBD3F0BPhvTbZ56BMwfc6oFdJw4qukNuqR03bcOvzK5UyFpHCxHjjkwuQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPVnh0GPPxWcVIPv6LSNSUW-2B-2BSwX2ethMr0rnSLTu-2BtLz7Ediy8lj7t7EmSm15AmB9Apb0vCJDP1NynJNs0BhpcrTqy4JAH11Z-2ByYuB7HHkVrvFArkDDGJPEe7qVjTYaouHa-2F5YUnQ-2Fty3GUj-2BZEoGqG-2BBowbmoBp6bndIVF5RPoXqyc0VU7eigS55DLfXNc-2FDO3wCMgCxgcwVJqvlf7ehB0lEdIYYwK7RS-2Btq1BddlCeM7-2FMahTj4ZyRXMwNZ998ctUR7jd4WpNqgs3OXKsFHECpeJY7EIQSIEDSHHzvte0526xiaa9Jgwg8bsRk-2BKQwtw1zy14wibe5Sz5j2Zde3d5jcwIIBcd1pasaAEZ2hz1W)

Rob served at the tip of the spear of perhaps the most important mission in the Global War on Terror, bringing ever-lasting justice to the mastermind of the 9/11 attacks against the United States.

[](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabakVDzy2nY5C2rNUqMCS8al-2BGcvd7iq-2Fx9Zq7DQWFu87wPzHiG7wTB9ewkguA3-2BnQ1Gj29d0I2mBD3F0BPhvTbZ56BMwfc6oFdJw4qukNuqR03bcOvzK5UyFpHCxHjjkwuQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPVnh0GPPxWcVIPv6LSNSUW-2B-2BSwX2ethMr0rnSLTu-2BtLz7Ediy8lj7t7EmSm15AmB9Apb0vCJDP1NynJNs0BhpcrTqy4JAH11Z-2ByYuB7HHkVrvFArkDDGJPEe7qVjTYaouHa-2F5YUnQ-2Fty3GUj-2BZEoGqHDzSMRcLTPatiFdjkoi4xwctItO8JuvuKZX9MCxMR999jUWOdS-2BQLq4yxIbIrtNZ5Qi6lKR-2Bf-2B9qBmDPFjLh5-2F844iPyQzJ-2BorWLP2eaCyNPxUWy3LY0-2B0Exry6zXbqO-2FbEyELXYoce6v-2FtJr4HYv0sni7QkRSb6Url2jzVo6TWiTxEOR0foCRAiwylMwZHax3wFHQWExgueuW9vUPE7jo)
Rob is one of the most highly decorated combat veterans of our time. He was deployed over a dozen times, and held combat leadership roles in more than 400 combat missions in four different theaters of war. Rob has been decorated more than 52 times with honors, including two Silver Stars, four Bronze Stars with Valor, a Joint Service Commendation Medal with Valor, three Presidential Unit citations, and two Navy/Marine Corps Commendations with Valor.

Eric is honored to have Rob join us in this mission -- and [we hope you'll join us on June 28th to welcome this American hero to Missouri!](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabakVDzy2nY5C2rNUqMCS8al-2BGcvd7iq-2Fx9Zq7DQWFu87wPzHiG7wTB9ewkguA3-2BnQ1Gj29d0I2mBD3F0BPhvTbZ56BMwfc6oFdJw4qukNuqR03bcOvzK5UyFpHCxHjjkwuQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPVnh0GPPxWcVIPv6LSNSUW-2B-2BSwX2ethMr0rnSLTu-2BtLz7Ediy8lj7t7EmSm15AmB9Apb0vCJDP1NynJNs0BhpcrTqy4JAH11Z-2ByYuB7HHkVrvFArkDDGJPEe7qVjTYaouHa-2F5YUnQ-2Fty3GUj-2BZEoGqH6y4lg0vnBLUdfpbZEnFCqNIQAj1cC-2BIgbZSsUfEyxD94O-2BT1kXu9ULwN5-2B135zAtpzxAIKDMTaD-2BiLXM8LaFPUIu-2BMQRQPyt3-2FgXD4QMaVZThwbjlvhqgPjbSJ3bi-2BTTVaLICupddbs-2FC1C-2FjSL-2FJMIaHCgwx1Yo4RhFkEenHvwN4HXMakouFFaSMv8bkod-2BtyUp8EVjt6K-2FqdPpT3VNg)

On to Victory,

Austin Chambers

[RsVP for the rally](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabakVDzy2nY5C2rNUqMCS8al-2BGcvd7iq-2Fx9Zq7DQWFu87wPzHiG7wTB9ewkguA3-2BnQ1Gj29d0I2mBD3F0BPhvTbZ56BMwfc6oFdJw4qukNuqR03bcOvzK5UyFpHCxHjjkwuQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPVnh0GPPxWcVIPv6LSNSUW-2B-2BSwX2ethMr0rnSLTu-2BtLz7Ediy8lj7t7EmSm15AmB9Apb0vCJDP1NynJNs0BhpcrTqy4JAH11Z-2ByYuB7HHkVrvFArkDDGJPEe7qVjTYaouHa-2F5YUnQ-2Fty3GUj-2BZEoGqEhuyAmzq2evj7lxg853xUtbuDrvmeCyMFth9mijc4WuBOQ5qQxz6RwJonWHtuwszWxwtG1w7mG389Ye-2Fz0FCqavVWKcCGzfnBm8wl-2FMEt599Rj6K3TjEYxifGJDpaI9whG5FEWcKwYgkBQLTGiOK0Gsb2DwNgHyV-2BgTqH5onaI8BEXVSpW9maipyqm48QQkQTYazMyBvaWTuEJ47DFsr7-2F)

clean_body: Peter, Did you hear the major announcement on Friday? Navy SEAL Team Six Operator, and one of our nation's most decorated veterans, Robert O'Neill will be coming to Missouri on June 28th to campaign with Eric! Among the events, will be Rob served at the tip of the spear of perhaps the most important mission in the Global War on Terror, bringing ever-lasting justice to the mastermind of the 9/11 attacks against the United States. Rob is one of the most highly decorated combat veterans of our time. He was deployed over a dozen times, and held combat leadership roles in more than 400 combat missions in four different theaters of war. Rob has been decorated more than 52 times with honors, including two Silver Stars, four Bronze Stars with Valor, a Joint Service Commendation Medal with Valor, three Presidential Unit citations, and two Navy/Marine Corps Commendations with Valor. Eric is honored to have Rob join us in this mission -- and On to Victory, Austin Chambers Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer 4579 Laclede Avenue #138 -- St. Louis, Missouri 63108

name: Team Katie
subject: Three big things
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Wow, I hope you’re ready for this:

FIRST, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight gave us a big boost — stating “winning re-election won’t be easy for [Toomey].”

THEN, two new PPP polls put us within inches of erasing Toomey’s already razor-thin lead.

NOW, the all experts at the Cook Political Report AND Sabato's Crystal Ball have agreed this race is a “Toss-up”.

Pat Toomey is in trouble because people like you have made this election too close to call — and if we can keep this momentum going now, then we can bring it all home.

Toomey is on the ropes. Chip in $5 today to put Katie in the lead:https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20160620.2&refcode2=e20160620.2ndb&amount=25

We’re in it to win it,

Team Katie

* A note on donations *

Katie is fighting for working families in PA — but we’re up against major special interest spending. We’re relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.
Donate Now - https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20160620.2&refcode2=e20160620.2ndb&amount=25

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

name: Team Bullock
subject: why it's so important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
Friend,

The upcoming governor's race is a big deal for the future of Montana. In two days, Steve has a big fundraising deadline -- it's the first of the general election and he's $4,359 short.

If you haven't yet, please be sure to chip in $15. Steve is up against an opponent who has already spent hundreds of thousands of dollars of his personal fortune with no end in sight.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sb-june?refcode=20160620&amount=25

Let's just do a quick run-through about why it's so important for you to get involved:

Steve has held the line on taxes for working families and Montana is ranked as the fairest tax system in the country./li>
Greg Gianforte's tax plan would give huge budget-busting tax breaks to millionaires like himself while the average family gets next to nothing.

Steve's spent his entire career working to protect access to public lands and waters.
Greg Gianforte filed a lawsuit against the state of Montana to block stream access on his property and has given tens of thousands of dollars to groups that want to privatize public lands.

Steve prioritizes public education and has made record investments in our public schools.
Greg Gianforte wants to divert money away from our public schools and put it toward private schools making it harder for every kid to get a quality public education.

Steve understands that Montana is a live and let live kind of place and has stood firm against discrimination.
Greg Gianforte has donated over $1.1 million dollars to anti-LGBT organizations including more than $500,000 to groups that promote gay conversion therapy.

Steve cut taxes for every small business in the state, while maintaining a $300 million rainy day fund. Under his leadership, Montana has the 6th best business tax climate of any state.
Greg Gianforte is planning millions in tax giveaways to big out-of-state corporations that would blow a hole in the budget and drain the rainy day fund.

There is a lot at stake and Steve is depending on Montanans to step up to protect the state we love. Please pitch in $15 today.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sb-june?refcode=20160620&amount=25

Thank you,
Team Bullock

Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please unsubscribe [ http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/o/51550/p/salsa/supporter/unsubscribe/public/?Email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&email_blast_KEY=1312818 ].

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Stand up to the NRA before tonight’s vote:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Speaking up matters. | Friend --

Our thoughts and prayers are not enough.

So many of us repeated that refrain after the tragic murder of 49 at an LGBT club in Orlando last weekend -- there have been far too many shootings in the last few years, and too little done to prevent them.

For too long, Republican members of Congress, under marching orders from the NRA, have blocked any form of gun violence prevention legislation -- including reforms that are patently obvious, like prohibiting suspected terrorists from buying guns and expanding background checks to more gun sales. We need both to keep guns out of the hands of terrorists.

Last Tuesday, Senator Chris Murphy -- who was serving as the congressman from Newtown, Connecticut when a shooter killed 26 people at an elementary school -- stood on the Senate floor and announced that he was beginning a filibuster that would not end until Republicans called for a vote on these reforms. He was joined by dozens of senators, from both sides of the aisle -- and it worked. The Senate is voting on important gun violence prevention measures today.

**Speaking up matters. Stand with Senator Murphy and the Senate Democrats by adding your name today:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU3ODU4MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzMDQwOTcwS0&mt=2&rj=ODIzMDQwOTcwS0&rt=0)
Thanks,

Hillary

|
**Chip in to stand with Hillary in the fight for gun violence prevention:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU3ODU4MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzMDQwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU3ODU4MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzMDQwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU3ODU4MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzMDQwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU3ODU4MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzMDQwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU3ODU4MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzMDQwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU3ODU4MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzMDQwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU3ODU4MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzMDQwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU3ODU4MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzMDQwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU3ODU4MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzMDQwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU3ODU4MTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzMDQwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Derailed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
This was a close call. | | **" Oil train derails, catches fire in Columbia River Gorge"
\-- _Seattle Times_ , June 3, 2016**
---
Friend,
This is a headline I wish I never had to see. It's yet another reminder of the dangers that oil trains pose to our communities.
We need stronger protections for our residents in Washington state.
The Oil Transportation Safety Act we passed in 2015 here in Washington was a good first step, but it was only a first step -- with rail cutting across several state lines, we are limited in what we can do.The buck stops with the federal government.
Federal authorities must act to reduce speed limits in rural areas, not just cities, or we risk yet another catastrophe. The U.S. Department of Transportation has also granted a generous amount of time to tank car manufacturers to get outdated cars off the track and replace them -- time that communities like Mosier cannot afford. This time can be cut in half.
While oil train commerce is interstate, the environmental consequences are local.
Inaction in Washington D.C. is putting Washington state at risk. Will you sign my petition today calling on the federal government to act, and help prevent the next health, safety, and environmental catastrophe? [**Take action by adding your name here.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=OTA4NTk4NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTQxOTY3MTI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=OTA4NTk4NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTQxOTY3MTI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you for your action on this important issue.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[**TAKE ACTION »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTA4NTk4NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTQxOTY3MTI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible.

Seattle, WA 98111
